disambiguation_rules.department of justice: Resolved from context: 'National Security Division of the Department of Justice' in subsection (d)(3)

oddities.note: Document is a single section (SEC. 2412) rather than a complete bill; appears to be extracted legislative text defining duty of care obligations for covered entities handling AI and personal data.

Document is a single section (SEC. 2501) of the Digital Consumer Protection Commission Act of 2023; appears to be extracted legislative text defining corporate citizenship and ownership requirements for dominant platform operators, including foreign investment review procedures.
